pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates PRD document at this path (lines 28-138)
setup_task.sh creates blank drawio file at this path (lines 13-25)
export_result.sh writes PNG to this path (line 9), consistent with setup_task.sh directory structure
PRD document specifies exactly 5 screens: SCREEN 1: HOME, SCREEN 2: TRIP PLANNER, SCREEN 3: ROUTE RESULTS, SCREEN 4: ROUTE DETAIL, SCREEN 5: ALERTS (setup_task.sh lines 51-118)

PRD does not explicitly specify a minimum shape count. Detailed component analysis shows 35-61 shapes depending on counting methodology. Verifier.py line 77-78 justifies 50 as expectation based on '~10-15 shapes per screen' approximation, not derived from PRD specification.
Page names match PRD specifications verbatim (in lowercase). PRD specifies: 'Home' (line 51), 'Trip Planner' (line 68), 'Route Results' (line 83), 'Route Detail' (line 95), 'Alerts' (line 110)
PRD line 86: 'Navigation header with back arrow "<-" and title "Available Routes"'
PRD line 106: '"Save Trip" (secondary style)' button specification
PRD line 87: 'Subtitle: "Main St to Airport Terminal 2"' and line 101: 'Stop 1: "8:05 AM — Board Bus 42 at Main St"'
PRD line 89: 'Route card 1: "Bus 42 -> Metro Line A"', line 98: 'title "Bus 42 -> Metro Line A"', line 101: 'Stop 1: "8:05 AM — Board Bus 42 at Main St"'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a 5-screen mobile app wireframe for 'CityTransit GO' transit planning app. All verified facts: The PRD document contains exactly 5 pages (Home, Trip Planner, Route Results, Route Detail, Alerts) with specified layouts and UI components. All 8 required text labels are present in the PRD (plan trip, recent trips, search routes, available routes, save trip, service alerts, main st, bus 42). File paths for PRD source and drawio/PNG outputs are correctly specified. The min_shapes claim of 50 is not derived from PRD specification but rather a verifier heuristic approximating 10-15 shapes per screen. Data is synthetically generated (fictional transit app mockup).
